object_a.label: other
object_a.long_form_open_description: Small white rectangular control device (likely a light switch or thermostat) mounted at standard height to the right of the American flag. Flush with the wall and matching surrounding wall color.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: immediately to the right of the flag, above the baseboard and below the ceiling light plane

object_b.label: other
object_b.long_form_open_description: White rectangular light switch plate with two rocker switches mounted on the left wall at standard switch height, immediately to the right of the hanging flag.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: directly below and to the right of the American flag on the left wall
